title: Implement _hop_hash( eui: bytes, epoch: int ) using lichen_hash_32 little-endian concat in generate.py
description: Add private helper matching spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md:122 Data=CONCAT(EUI64-BE, Epoch-LE-u32) and current hash_32. Use for ccp_hop_vectors. Reference hash_32.json and ccp16-hop.json:6. No dead code.
close_reason: Implemented _hop_hash helper in generate.py, updated callers and test to eliminate duplicate hash logic and dead code, updated ccp16-hop.json placeholder with real value. Tests use the helper for consistency with spec concat.
